title: Housing Enquiry

segments.text: Hello, I'm calling about the room advertised in the local paper.
Yes, I'm starting at the university in September.
The room is on the first floor, fully furnished, and bills are included.
The rent is six hundred pounds per month.
Yes, one month's rent in advance.
When can I view the room?
Would Saturday at two work for you?

transcript: Hello, I'm calling about the room advertised in the local paper. Of course. Are you a student? Yes, I'm starting at the university in September. The room is on the first floor, fully furnished, and bills are included. The rent is six hundred pounds per month. Is there a deposit? Yes, one month's rent in advance. When can I view the room? Would Saturday at two work for you? Perfect.
